name: Sonocom Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sonocom Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells screen printing plates, printing materials, and machinery and equipment for electronics industry in Japan. The company offers screen masks, metal masks, photomasks, screen printing equipment, rotary screens, and print experiment products. The company was formerly known as Sowano Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sonocom Co.,Ltd. in April 1990. Sonocom Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1962 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
